description: YAML linting for Kubernetes deployment manifests

hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in */deploy/*.yaml|*/deploy/*.yml|*kustomization*.yaml|*kustomization*.yml) command -v yamllint >/dev/null 2>&1 && { yamllint -d relaxed "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -10 || true; } || echo 'yamllint not found, skipping' >&2;; esac
